TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Murisaka = Gaga mniq Hwareyseyn Wanjungsyang ka alang Murisaka. 148 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 463 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 97% niqan 448 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 3% niqan 15 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Truku 80%, Amis 4%, Tayal 3%, Paiwan 2%, ni rahuq na o 7%.
S.PHON: = muɾisaka = gaga mniq ħwaɾəsən wanɟuŋsjaŋ ka alaŋ muɾisaka. *** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal *% niqan ** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, tɾuku **%, amis *%, tajal *%, paiwan *%, ni ɾaħuq na o *%.
S.FORM: = Murisaka = Gaga mniq Hwareyseyn Wanjungsyang ka alang Murisaka. 148 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 463 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 97% niqan 448 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 3% niqan 15 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Truku 80%, Amis 4%, Tayal 3%, Paiwan 2%, ni rahuq na o 7%.
S.PHON: = muɾisaka = gaga mniq ħwaɾəsən wanɟuŋsjaŋ ka alaŋ muɾisaka. *** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal *% niqan ** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, tɾuku **%, amis *%, tajal *%, paiwan *%, ni ɾaħuq na o *%.
